Package de.weinzierlstefan.expressionparser.value

Class ValueList

java.lang.Object
java.util.AbstractCollection<E>
java.util.AbstractList<E>
java.util.ArrayList<Value>
de.weinzierlstefan.expressionparser.value.ValueList
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, java.lang.Iterable<Value>, java.util.Collection<Value>, java.util.List<Value>, java.util.RandomAccess
public class ValueList
extends java.util.ArrayList<Value>
A List of Values, which additional helper functions
